name: mcp-server-elevenlabs
description: Enables voice synthesis and audio processing via APIs.

rating.reason: This toolset demonstrates good documentation quality overall. Tool names are clear and descriptive (text_to_speech, voice_clone, create_agent), and most descriptions provide adequate context about functionality and usage. The inclusion of cost warnings is excellent and important for user awareness. However, parameter documentation is inconsistent - while some complex parameters have detailed explanations with ranges and constraints, many parameters lack sufficient descriptions (e.g., 'voice_id' simply says 'Voice Id'). The schema is well-structured with proper types and defaults, but the verbose description format in some tools creates inconsistency across the toolset.
